route.name: Salt and Silver Overnighter
route.description: Public GPX Utah desert overnighter with gravel, dirt roads, exposed terrain, and sparse water logistics.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX Utah desert overnighter with gravel, dirt roads, exposed terrain, and sparse water logistics.
route.bestSeason: Cool season is preferred; July heat is a blocker.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX Utah desert overnighter with gravel, dirt roads, exposed terrain, and sparse water logistics.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access

resources.water: Sparse desert water; verify every source and carry substantial capacity.
resources.food: Carry route food; verify any nearby services before relying on them.
resources.camping: Desert camping rules and current restrictions need verification.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before gate confirmation.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Do not promote for next weekend.
